_comment: Flow 7: Insurance Expiry Reminder. Scheduled daily at 7:00 AM Mountain Time. Reads active va_ReminderConfig to get current intervals. Queries all unsent va_InsuranceReminderSchedule rows due today or earlier. For each: sends appropriate Teams message. On GracePeriod type: checks if grace period is elapsed and terminates the va_AllowanceRecord if so.

recurrence._comment: 14:00 UTC = 7:00 AM MT (MST UTC-7). Adjust to 13:00 UTC during MDT (UTC-6) summer months. Consider using a timezone-aware trigger or Azure Time Zone conversion.

1_Get_active_reminder_config._comment: Read the single active va_ReminderConfig record to get current reminder intervals and grace period.

2_Get_due_reminder_schedules._comment: All unsent reminder rows where reminderDate <= today. Ordered by reminderDate ascending.

parameters.$filter: va_isSent eq false and va_reminderDate le @{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd')}

Reminder1_2_3._comment: Covers Reminder1, Reminder2, Reminder3 — standard advance notice to employee.

parameters.body/messageBody: Insurance Renewal Reminder: Your @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyType']} policy (@{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_carrierName']} — @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyNumber']}) expires on @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_expirationDate']}. Please upload your renewal declaration page to maintain your Vehicle Allowance. Upload Renewal

⚠️ URGENT — Insurance Expired: Your @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyType']} policy expired today. You have @{first(outputs('1_Get_active_reminder_config')?['body/value'])?['va_gracePeriodDays']} days to upload a renewal before your allowance is suspended. Upload Now

⚠️ Insurance Expired: @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_allowancerecordid_value/va_applicantName']}'s @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyType']} policy expired today. Grace period: @{first(outputs('1_Get_active_reminder_config')?['body/value'])?['va_gracePeriodDays']} days. Personnel #: @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['va_personnelNumber']}.

⚠️ Insurance Expired: @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_allowancerecordid_value/va_applicantName']}'s @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyType']} policy expired. Grace period ends in @{first(outputs('1_Get_active_reminder_config')?['body/value'])?['va_gracePeriodDays']} days. Personnel #: @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['va_personnelNumber']}.

Grace_period_elapsed_terminate_allowance._comment: Grace period has elapsed with no renewal. Terminate the AllowanceRecord.

parameters.item/va_terminationReason: Insurance policy @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyType']} (@{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_carrierName']}) expired @{first(outputs('1_Get_active_reminder_config')?['body/value'])?['va_gracePeriodDays']} days ago. No renewal received.

parameters.body/messageBody: ⛔ Vehicle Allowance Suspended: Your allowance has been suspended due to an expired insurance policy. Contact the Equipment Department immediately to discuss reinstatement options.

⛔ Allowance Terminated — Insurance Non-Compliance: @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_allowancerecordid_value/va_applicantName']} (Personnel #@{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['va_personnelNumber']}) — grace period elapsed without insurance renewal. Allowance terminated. Payroll notification required.

Vehicle Allowance Terminated — Stop Payment: Personnel #@{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['va_personnelNumber']} — @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_allowancerecordid_value/va_applicantName']}. Effective immediately. Reason: Insurance non-compliance.

default._comment: Also handle Reminder2 and Reminder3 — same pattern as Reminder1 case above.

parameters.body/messageBody: Insurance Renewal Reminder: Your @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_policyType']} policy expires @{items('3_Process_each_due_reminder')?['_va_policyid_value/va_expirationDate']}. Upload Renewal
